title: 2026-06-29 Lagos Adire Indigo Rain Monday
summary: Lagos rainy-season set using adire indigo across CcHUB Yaba work cleanup, Lekki Conservation Centre canopy movement, Terra Kulture theater arrival, and Balogun Market fabric carrying.
summaryJa: ラゴスのアルバム。色の軸はアディレインディゴ。構成は仕事場、街歩き、イベント会場、マーケット。

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman inside a CcHUB Yaba-style Lagos coworking space after a rainy-season tech and fashion workshop, tidying extension cables and adire fabric swatches into a tote while answering an off-frame coworker, wearing an indigo sleeveless linen tailoring vest over an ivory rib tee, charcoal cropped wrap-front wide trousers, bare ankles, black low mules, silver hoops, and carrying an indigo stitched laptop sleeve
images.title: 01 Office CcHUB Yaba cable cleanup

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman balancing intentionally along the wet Lekki Conservation Centre canopy walkway after light rain, smiling toward a near-camera friend while wearing an indigo cropped rain shell over a white fitted tank, dark technical micro skort over black bike shorts, opaque white ribbed ankle sport socks with an indigo stripe, plain black trail sneakers, and a small unmarked crossbody pouch
images.title: 02 Active Lekki canopy balance
images.locationDetail: wet Lekki Conservation Centre canopy walkway

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman arriving at Terra Kulture in Victoria Island, Lagos before an evening performance, adjusting a silver earring and turning toward an off-frame companion near a rain-wet doorway, wearing an indigo adire cropped halter shell with opaque lining, sheer black short-sleeve overshirt, black asymmetric mini wrap skirt over fitted city shorts, matte indigo thigh-high opaque stockings, low black slingback pumps, and a small beaded indigo evening pouch
images.title: 03 Theater Terra Kulture earring
images.locationDetail: Terra Kulture in Victoria Island, Lagos

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman moving sideways through Balogun Market on Lagos Island after rain, carrying indigo fabric bolts against her hip and speaking to an off-frame vendor amid stacked textiles, awnings, tarps, concrete steps, and puddles, wearing a white short-sleeve button shirt tied at the waist over a deep indigo square-neck cotton camisole, charcoal city half pants with a wrap apron panel, bare legs, black low block-heel sandals, indigo enamel ring, indigo hair clip, and a soft black shoulder bag
images.title: 04 Market Balogun fabric carry
